notes: Boxborough MA (Middlesex) — MAPC layer 2 (strip ^25). Parcels carry reduced assessor codes (AR/OP/C/B/TC) with no 'IC' column, so a spatial rebind confirms which parcels sit in the Industrial-Commercial (IC) district along Codman Hill Rd. Ordinance districts per Article 3 of the Boxborough Zoning Bylaw (boxborough-ma.gov View/1918, 2025): AR/R1 residential; B/B1 business; OP office park; TC town center; IC industrial-commercial (the only self-storage-by-right district, Table 4.1.3.d 'Self-storage facility' = Y in IC only).
